title: CSX modernizes data platform with Infosys and Microsoft
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the successful completion of a major data modernization program for CSX Corporation using Infosys Topaz, Microsoft Fabric and Microsoft Purview. Infosys led the end-to-end modernization, consolidating CSX's fragmented data landscape into a unified cloud-native platform intended to improve decision-making, accelerate reporting and reduce operational costs. The program created automated metadata governance across 28 domains and 170+ data products, consolidated over 50,000 legacy reports into 1,200 actionable insights, and supported real-time analytics, AI accelerators, self-serve analytics and Azure monitoring. The document states that CSX achieved significant annual infrastructure savings and built a foundation for predictive analytics, logistics optimization and enterprise-wide operational intelligence, but it does not disclose contract value, duration, or quantified savings.
